description_long: This is a tall, rectangular vending machine with a predominantly brown and beige exterior. The front face features a large transparent display window showcasing various canned beverages, with a product selection interface and payment system located to the right. Below the display window, there is a product retrieval slot and a small digital screen, while the rest of the machine is composed of smooth, solid panels. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or features, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal and glass, with some plastic components for the interface and internal mechanisms. Its robust build and clear product display make it suitable for placement in public urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular vending machine with a glass display window, product selection and payment interface, and a product retrieval slot on the front. The exterior is mainly brown and beige, with a sturdy, smooth finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, solid brown panel with minimal visible features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the glass product window, selection and payment interface, product retrieval slot, and branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain brown panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a featureless, solid brown panel.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right of the front face, featuring a digital screen and printed instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel on the right, including a card reader and a coin slot.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual product selection buttons are arranged vertically to the right of the display window, each labeled for different products.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located below the display window on the left, with a flap for accessing dispensed items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding is visible at the top right of the front face, with the text 'SANDEN' in white on a brown background, and additional signage above the display window.
